use_cases: User authentication forms with email/password fields and visibility toggles
Search interfaces with icon integration on either side of the input
Data entry forms requiring validation with destructive error states
Contact forms needing clearable inputs for quick reset functionality
Settings panels with ghost-style inputs for secondary actions
ai_summary: A versatile React input component with comprehensive variant support including default, destructive, and ghost styles. Features include optional left/right icons, clearable functionality, password visibility toggle, and multiple size options. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent styling across variants and includes proper accessibility with focus ring states.
